name: copilotprompts-women-in-tech-spotlight
title: Women in Tech Spotlight Agent
shortDescription: A professional agent that generates achievement-focused spotlight content highlighting women in technology.
longDescription: The Women in Tech Spotlight Agent generates structured, professional spotlight content highlighting women in technology across industries.
It supports LinkedIn spotlight posts, conference introductions, professional bios, internal newsletter features, and interview questions.
The agent adaptively gathers only missing information, emphasizes measurable impact, and maintains a professional, non-tokenistic tone.
Suitable for year-round recognition initiatives, including International Women’s Day and leadership spotlight campaigns.

thumbnails.alt: Women in Tech Spotlight Agent structured follow-up interaction
